# Registries.ToolUiMetaFailure enumeration

The reason a tool `_meta.ui` value fails validation (spec R-AppC-i).

```csharp
public enum ToolUiMetaFailure
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| None | `0` | No failure (success). |
| NotAnObject | `1` | The value is not an object. |
| MissingResourceUri | `2` | The `resourceUri` field is absent or not a string. |
| ResourceUriNotUiUri | `3` | The `resourceUri` is not a `ui://` URI. |
